cards.title: Proposal Generation
cards.body: Discovery call notes (Fathom, Fireflies, or a shared doc) get turned into a scoped proposal draft — matched against your last 20 signed SOWs for pricing and phrasing — ready for the partner to edit in 15 minutes instead of rebuilding from scratch. For {{situationDetail}}, we'd index your won-deal corpus so the drafts sound like your firm, not a generic template.
cards.metric: Proposal turnaround from 3–5 days to same-day

cards.title: Client Onboarding Packet
cards.body: Signed engagement letter triggers a packet build: shared drive provisioned, intake forms dispatched via DocuSign, kickoff scheduled in Calendly, welcome email personalized to the engagement type. The client's first 48 hours feel deliberate instead of chaotic.
cards.metric: Onboarding admin from ~4 hours to 20 min per client

cards.title: Billable-Time Capture
cards.body: Calendar events, Gmail threads, and Slack DMs with client contacts get suggested as billable entries in a nightly review queue. The partner approves, edits, or rejects — no more reconstructing last Thursday from memory on billing day. Writes straight into Clio, MyCase, or your PM system of choice.
cards.metric: ~15% recovered billable hours most firms were silently leaking

ctaLine: Typical build is 3–4 weeks for a firm of 5–25 professionals. Book a call — we'll pick the workflow with the highest recovered-revenue math and scope it on-screen.
